title: rubus vestitus var. fraternus
intro: Rubus vestitus var. fraternus, also known as Fraternal Black Raspberry, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rubus vestitus plant species, primarily found in the mountainous regions of China. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus vestitus var. fraternus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Rubus vestitus var. fraternus can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, with the former typically made by infusing the dried leaves and berries in hot water, while the latter is created by extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
